description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a boxy structure. The exterior is clad in light gray vertical siding, contrasted by black window frames and a white door. Large windows and a glass sliding door provide ample natural light to the interior, while the flat roof and simple geometric form emphasize contemporary aesthetics. Four tall, conical evergreen trees are positioned along one side, adding greenery and privacy. The house appears to have a single story with a compact, efficient layout. The entryway is understated, with a plain white door and no visible porch or overhang.
description: A modern, single-story house with light gray vertical siding, large black-framed windows, and a flat roof, complemented by four tall evergreen trees along one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with four tall evergreen trees, large windows, and the primary entrance area.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the light gray siding, flat roof, and the absence of trees on this side.
description_view_2: Side view with a clear look at the white entry door, a small window, and the row of trees visible behind the house.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back wall, flat roof, and the row of evergreen trees to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Simple white door with no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
